overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a rocky lakeshore during golden hour, transitioning to a lush misty coastal environment. The video features high-fidelity game engine graphics with detailed natural landscapes and dynamic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: arid rocky lakeshore with shallow pools

events.description: character walks from dry rocky ground into shallow water along the shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky lakeshore, wading through shallow pools of water while exploring the terrain

entered.detail: large reddish-brown mountain range with layered rock formations forming the backdrop
calm lake water reflecting the warm sky and surrounding terrain
leafless dried tree trunk standing on the rocky shore
uneven rocky ground with scattered stones and boulders
shallow water pools and streams along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an arid rocky lakeshore during golden hour, with red rock mountains dominating the background. The terrain features sparse vegetation, scattered boulders, and shallow pools of water that the character wades through while exploring the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: lush tropical coastal cliff with misty atmosphere

events.description: scene dissolves from arid rocky landscape to lush green coastal environment with misty atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking along grassy cliff edge overlooking misty water, continuing exploration in the new environment

entered.detail: steep grass-covered cliffside with dense tropical vegetation and ferns
calm water surface with atmospheric mist and fog near the horizon
tropical palm tree growing on the cliff edge
large rocky island formation rising from the misty water

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions via dissolve to a lush, green coastal environment with dense tropical vegetation and misty atmosphere. The character continues walking along a grassy cliff edge overlooking calm water, with rocky islands visible through the mist in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey that transforms from an arid, sun-drenched lakeshore into a lush, misty coastal wilderness. It begins with the character wading through shallow pools and navigating scattered boulders along a rocky shore, set against a backdrop of towering red rock mountains under the warm glow of golden hour. As the environment shifts, the dry terrain dissolves into a vibrant green landscape filled with dense tropical vegetation and a heavy, atmospheric mist. The scene then expands as the character walks along a grassy cliff edge, overlooking calm waters where rocky islands emerge through the haze.
